name: Safflower Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a blender; whirl.
2. With the machine running, add safflower oil, one tablespoon at a time.
3. Refrigerate. Keeps several weeks. Yield: 1-1/2 cups.
Variation: To make herb mayonnaise, add 1/2 teaspoon basil, dill, tarragon, or parsley before serving.
